title: FrustrationSignal
description: A behavioural telemetry signal indicating that an agent or user is experiencing difficulty (e.g. repeated failure, tool loop, user interrupt).

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

sessionRef.description: URN of the AgentSession in which this signal was observed. Pattern: urn:srcos:session:<id>

signal.description: The observed signal type: strong-negative-language, cancel, repeated-failure, tool-loop, or user-interrupt.

count.description: Number of times this signal was observed in the session (null if not counted).

capturedAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this signal was first captured.
